extract: Marshadow (Japanese: マーシャドー Marshadow) is a dual-type Fighting/Ghost Mythical Pokémon introduced in Generation VII. It is not known to evolve into or from any other Pokémon. Marshadow was officially revealed on April 7, 2017. In Pokémon Sun and Moon, it is the last Pokémon in the Alola Pokédex before its expansion in Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon. In the movie I Choose You!, it is associated with Ho-Oh.
